items.description: Instagram Reporting Tool. This tool automates the process of reporting Instagram profiles that may violate the platform's policies. You can quickly report spam accounts, fake profiles, and other violations. This guide will help you with the software easily.

items.name: PageSpeed-CLI
items.description: PageSpeed-CLI is an AI-ready command-line plugin for Google PageSpeed Insights. It helps developers and AI coding agents quickly collect PageSpeed/Lighthouse evidence for a single website or a batch of websites, then turns the raw report into actionable optimization briefs.

items.name: TAM
items.description: 模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在自回归生成过程中由于强烈的上下文依赖（Contextual Interference），常导致传统视觉归因方法（如 CAM 变体）生成包含大量冗余噪声的激活图(附录Figure 1)。ICCV 2025 提出的 Token Activation Map (TAM) 方法通过因果推断剥离上下文干扰，并结合秩高斯滤波（Rank Gaussian Filter）实现了精准的 Token 级视觉对齐。在分析和跑通TAM框架的基础上对其在动态时空任务（如长视频理解）中的泛化能力，及其底层去噪算法在纯视觉基础模型中的跨架构迁移潜力进行了验证。最后结合了多模态方向的工作进行了综合性的分析。

items.name: adversarial-ai-coding-plugin
items.description: Adversarial AI Coding: Self-Play Sparring, Offense Meets Defense — Making AI Write Secure Code

items.name: pune-price-prediction-fastapi
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning project that predicts residential property prices in Pune (in ₹ Lakhs) and returns a 95% confidence interval. The project ships a trained ensemble model behind a FastAPI inference service and a lightweight HTML/CSS/JS frontend.

items.name: EasyStateMachine
items.description: EasyStateMachine is a Godot 4 add-on that provides a modular, self-contained finite state machine (FSM) system adaptable to both 2D and 3D projects. Unlike homemade solutions, it’s built for scalability: each state exists as its own node, is managed through a custom inspector, and offers a clean API to handle a wide range of use cases.

items.name: opencode-agent-monitor
items.description: OpenCode plugin that monitors, audits, and analyzes agent/subagent routing, tool usage, and domain assignment in AI coding sessions. Features open domain detection, routing mismatch alerts, sensitive data redaction, and structured JSON-line logging — zero configuration required.
